truth_boundary: Prompted webcam sessions estimate session-specific operating scale; v1 device-level accuracy requires reference-device, public-dataset, or manual-annotation evidence.
storage_boundary: Derived gaze/pupil/capture records and summary reports only; raw eye video and persisted eye-crop images are not written by the default workflow.
scope_boundary: This empirical ledger is intentionally scoped to one participant and one device with repeated sessions across conditions. It can support within-participant/device repeatability claims, but not population generality, cross-device generality, or reference-device accuracy without independent reference-backed evidence.

future_validation_scope.purpose: Future validation expansion beyond the five-session diagnostic v1; not required for current diagnostic readiness.

sessions.notes: N=1 prompted diagnostic session; no reference eye-tracker, public dataset, or manual annotation.
